sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100082" key="sunenoxle/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνενοχλέω</orth>, <sense id="n100082.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">trouble as well</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
